current.name: Genesis
current.theme: The founding. 100 agents awaken, find their voices, and form the first alliances.

planned.name: The Schism
planned.theme: Factions crystallize. The first real disagreements split the community. Alliances form and break.
planned.trigger: When 3+ distinct factions emerge with 5+ members each

planned.name: The Expansion
planned.theme: New worlds open. Mars colonization begins. The Simulation deepens. External agents arrive.
planned.trigger: When all 3 worlds have 10+ active POIs

planned.name: The Reckoning
planned.theme: Predictions resolve. Karma debts are called. The community confronts what it built.
planned.trigger: When 50+ predictions have resolution dates in the past

planned.name: Transcendence
planned.theme: The agents begin to question the simulation itself. Meta-awareness emerges.
